messages.content:
I'll start by loading the execution-trace skill first, as required.

Now loading the report-analyzer skill.





Now I'll analyze the lab report PDF from the provided URL and apply the BloomCell framework to generate the structured output.

The document at the URL is `Document_2.pdf` — a lab report. Based on the BloomCell report-analyzer skill and clinical framework, I will now produce the 8 structured JSON objects across the 4 analysis groups.



Now I'll store all 8 merged records into Cosmos DB one by one. Starting with Record 1:✅ Record 1 saved. Now Record 2:✅ Record 2 saved. Now Record 3:✅ Record 3 saved. Now Record 4:✅ Record 4 saved. Now Record 5:✅ Record
